entry.title: NVIDIA's Nemotron-TwoTower Hits 2.42x Faster Generation Without Retraining
entry.summary: NVIDIA splits a 30B model into two specialized towers to generate text 2.42x faster while keeping 98.7% of the original model's quality

entry.title: Cognition's Devin Security Swarm Finds 72% of Vulnerabilities for $90
entry.summary: Cognition's Devin Security Swarm uses a new Agentic MapReduce architecture to find real vulnerabilities across entire codebases, outperforming Claude and Codex at 30% lower cost.

entry.title: Zed v1.9 Ships Telescope-Style Resizable Pickers After 860 Upvotes
entry.summary: Zed v1.9 ships Telescope-style resizable pickers with live preview, in-thread agent search, and a new text finder modal â resolving an 860-upvote community request

entry.title: Z.ai's ZCode Ships a Desktop Agent Built Around GLM-5.2's 1M-Token Window
entry.summary: Z.ai launches ZCode, a dedicated desktop IDE for GLM-5.2, with 1.5x quota for subscribers and BYOK support across all platforms

entry.title: xAI's Grok Voice Agent Builder Undercuts Every Rival at $0.05 a Minute
entry.summary: xAI's no-code Voice Agent Builder lets anyone deploy a production phone agent in two minutes, powered by the #1-ranked Grok Voice model, at $0.05/min

entry.title: Fish Audio Opens S2.1 Pro to Developers With Free Unlimited API Access
entry.summary: Fish Audio opens its best TTS model, S2.1 Pro, to all developers for free â 83 languages, voice cloning, no hard usage cap

entry.title: Together AI's ParallelKernelBench Reveals Top Models Fail 70% of Multi-GPU Tasks
entry.summary: Together AI's ParallelKernelBench reveals frontier models solve under a third of 87 real multi-GPU kernel problems, exposing a critical blind spot in AI coding benchmarks.

entry.title: Higgsfield Brings ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 to 4K VFX Without Green Screens
entry.summary: Higgsfield's Seedance 2.0 in native 4K lets anyone drop Hollywood-grade VFX onto real footage without compositing or green screens

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 Ban Lifted After 18 Days of Global Chaos
entry.summary: After 18 days of global shutdown, the Trump administration lifts export controls on Anthropic's two most powerful AI models, ending a standoff that reshaped how governments regulate frontier AI

entry.title: Microsoft's WSL Containers Kill Docker Desktop's Grip on Windows Dev
entry.summary: WSL 2.9.3 ships wslc.exe, a Docker-compatible container CLI and Windows API baked directly into WSL â no third-party tooling required

entry.title: NVIDIA's GPC Teaches Game Characters to Move Like GPT Thinks
entry.summary: NVIDIA's GPC treats motor skills like language tokens, training one physics controller that can be fine-tuned to any task

entry.title: Google Rebuilds ADK Go 2.0 Around Graph-Based Agent Workflows
entry.summary: ADK Go 2.0 ships a graph-based workflow engine, native human-in-the-loop, and a unified runtime that makes multi-agent Go apps production-ready
